requirement_topic.en: Qatari Authorized Importer / Distributor and CRA Labelling Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 卡塔尔授权进口商/分销商及CRA标签要求
requirement_topic.zht: 卡達授權進口商/分銷商及CRA標籤要求

summary.en: Only authorized importers or distributors registered in Qatar may import and commercially supply CRA type-approved wireless and telecom terminal equipment in Qatar. The overseas manufacturer must appoint a Qatari authorized importer or distributor as the responsible in-country party for the CRA type approval application and ongoing compliance obligations. The CRA type approval certificate number and CRA approval mark must appear visibly on the device label and packaging in both Arabic and English before import or sale. Labelling in Arabic and English is preferred by CRA and customs authorities. Unauthorized importation or sale of unapproved radio equipment is an offence under Qatar telecommunications law. Qatar's position as a logistics and commercial hub in the Gulf region means CRA type approval is distinct from, and does not confer access to, other GCC markets; separate type approval from CITRA (Kuwait), TRA UAE, or NTRA (Bahrain) is required for sale in those markets, although GCC MRA bilateral recognition filings based on the CRA Qatar certificate may streamline multi-market approval.
summary.zh: 只有在卡塔尔注册的授权进口商或分销商方可在卡塔尔进口和商业供应经CRA型号认证的无线及电信终端设备。海外制造商须委任卡塔尔授权进口商或分销商，作为CRA型号认证申请及持续合规义务的卡塔尔境内责任方。CRA型号认证证书编号和CRA审批标志须以阿拉伯文和英文清晰显示于设备标签和包装上，方可进口或销售。阿拉伯文和英文标注为CRA和海关当局所倡导。未经授权进口或销售未经认证的无线电设备属卡塔尔电信法律规定的违规行为。卡塔尔作为海湾地区物流和商业枢纽，CRA型号认证与其他GCC市场的准入截然不同，且不赋予进入其他GCC市场的权利；在科威特CITRA、阿联酋TRA或巴林NTRA销售须分别取得相应型号认证，但基于CRA卡塔尔证书提交的GCC MRA双边认可申请可简化多市场审批流程。
summary.zht: 只有在卡達注冊的授權進口商或分銷商方可在卡達進口和商業供應經CRA型號認證的無線及電信終端設備。海外製造商須委任卡達授權進口商或分銷商，作為CRA型號認證申請及持續合規義務的卡達境內責任方。CRA型號認證證書編號和CRA審批標誌須以阿拉伯文和英文清晰顯示於裝置標籤和包裝上，方可進口或銷售。阿拉伯文和英文標注為CRA和海關當局所倡導。未經授權進口或銷售未經認證的無線電設備屬卡達電信法律規定的違規行為。卡達作為海灣地區物流和商業樞紐，CRA型號認證與其他GCC市場的准入截然不同，且不賦予進入其他GCC市場的權利；在科威特CITRA、阿聯酋TRA或巴林NTRA銷售須分別取得相應型號認證，但基於CRA卡達證書提交的GCC MRA雙邊認可申請可簡化多市場審批流程。

standards_or_laws: Qatar Law No. 34 of 2006 on Telecommunications (import/sale provisions)
CRA Qatar Type Approval Conditions — Authorized Importer and Distributor Requirements
CRA Qatar Label and Marking Requirements (CRA approval mark and certificate number — Arabic and English)
GCC MRA for Telecommunications Equipment (bilateral recognition: CITRA Kuwait, TRA UAE, NTRA Bahrain)

summary.en: In China, the MIIT Network Access License (NAL) must be held by the manufacturer or its authorized representative. The CCC certificate holder (manufacturer or appointed agent) is responsible for placing the CCC mark on in-scope products. Distributors and importers are not required to hold a separate CCC importer licence but must source from CCC-certified channels. Products sold in China bonded zones or pilot free trade zones for re-export are exempt from CCC, but any transition to domestic retail triggers full CCC obligations.
summary.zh: 在中国，工信部网络接入许可（NAL）须由制造商或其授权代表持有。CCC证书持有人（制造商或指定代理人）负责在列入目录的产品上标注CCC标志。经销商和进口商无需持有单独的CCC进口商许可证，但须从CCC认证渠道采购。在中国保税区或试点自由贸易区内为转口目的销售的产品可豁免CCC，但转入国内零售则须履行完整的CCC义务。
summary.zht: 在中國，工信部網路接入許可（NAL）須由製造商或其授權代表持有。CCC證書持有人（製造商或指定代理人）負責在列入目錄的產品上標注CCC標誌。經銷商和進口商無需持有單獨的CCC進口商許可證，但須從CCC認證渠道採購。在中國保稅區或試點自由貿易區內為轉口目的銷售的產品可豁免CCC，但轉入國內零售則須履行完整的CCC義務。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Administration of Telecom Equipment Access
CCC Authorized Applicant and Certificate Holder Rules (CNCA)
China Pilot Free Trade Zone CCC Exemption Rules (for re-export only)

gap.en: Qatar requires a locally registered Qatari authorized importer or distributor — a Qatar-specific obligation with no direct CCC/NAL equivalent. The CRA Qatar approval mark and certificate number must appear on the physical device label in Arabic and English; China-market products carrying SRRC/CCC markings require a label change or re-stickering programme for Qatar. The GCC MRA bilateral recognition filing opportunity (CITRA Kuwait, TRA UAE, NTRA Bahrain) is a strategic advantage of holding CRA Qatar approval, but each GCC state still requires its own formal recognition step; CRA Qatar approval alone does not automatically grant access to other GCC markets. Manufacturers targeting multiple Gulf markets should plan a CRA-Qatar-first type approval strategy to maximise GCC MRA leverage.
gap.zh: 卡塔尔要求在本地注册的卡塔尔授权进口商或分销商，这是卡塔尔特有义务，无对应的CCC/NAL等效要求。卡塔尔CRA审批标志和证书编号须以阿拉伯文和英文显示于实体设备标签上；携带SRRC/CCC标志的中国市场产品须更换或重贴标签。GCC MRA双边认可申请机会（科威特CITRA、阿联酋TRA、巴林NTRA）是持有卡塔尔CRA批准的战略优势，但每个GCC国家仍需独立的正式认可步骤；仅凭卡塔尔CRA批准不能自动获得其他GCC市场准入。目标多个海湾市场的制造商应规划以CRA卡塔尔优先的型号认证策略，以最大化GCC MRA联动效益。
gap.zht: 卡達要求在本地注冊的卡達授權進口商或分銷商，這是卡達特有義務，無對應的CCC/NAL等效要求。卡達CRA審批標誌和證書編號須以阿拉伯文和英文顯示於實體裝置標籤上；攜帶SRRC/CCC標誌的中國市場產品須更換或重貼標籤。GCC MRA雙邊認可申請機會（科威特CITRA、阿聯酋TRA、巴林NTRA）是持有卡達CRA批准的戰略優勢，但每個GCC國家仍需獨立的正式認可步驟；僅憑卡達CRA批准不能自動獲得其他GCC市場准入。目標多個海灣市場的製造商應規劃以CRA卡達優先的型號認證策略，以最大化GCC MRA聯動效益。

source.publisher: CRA — Communications Regulatory Authority Qatar (هيئة الاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Qatari authorized importer or distributor registered in Qatar is mandatory for commercial import and sale of wireless equipment. The CRA approval mark and certificate number must appear in Arabic and English on device label and packaging. CRA Qatar approval does not automatically grant access to other GCC markets — GCC MRA bilateral recognition with CITRA Kuwait, TRA UAE, and NTRA Bahrain requires separate filings but is strategically advantageous when CRA Qatar approval is the anchor certificate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在卡塔尔商业进口和销售无线设备须有在卡塔尔注册的授权进口商或分销商。CRA审批标志和证书编号须以阿拉伯文和英文标注于设备标签和包装上。卡塔尔CRA批准不自动赋予其他GCC市场准入权限，GCC MRA与科威特CITRA、阿联酋TRA和巴林NTRA的双边认可须分别申请，但以卡塔尔CRA批准为基础证书时具有战略优势。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在卡達商業進口和銷售無線設備須有在卡達注冊的授權進口商或分銷商。CRA審批標誌和證書編號須以阿拉伯文和英文標注於裝置標籤和包裝上。卡達CRA批准不自動賦予其他GCC市場准入權限，GCC MRA與科威特CITRA、阿聯酋TRA和巴林NTRA的雙邊認可須分別申請，但以卡達CRA批准為基礎證書時具有戰略優勢。
